utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Checking the final package: 
1. destination – included and clearly specified (Lisbon, Portugal). 
2. travel_dates – included and clearly specified (September 15–19, 2024). 
3. transportation – included (flight details with costs fully specified: airline, times, cost). 
4. accommodation – included (hotel name, nights, cost per night, total cost). 
5. activities – included (specific activities with costs). 
6. additional_services – included (meals, local transport, optional taxi, all with costs). 
7. total_budget – included (total cost breakdown with and without optional taxi). All seven items are present and fully detailed.
